summary: Boost Growth Portal v4 (Feb 2026): Backend 17/17 pytest tests PASS (100%). All new features verified: 25 clients with multi-service locations (Saleh #009 has 3 locs, Salman #038 has 2 HS+SS), 25 intake (12 pre + 13 post) with new fields service/district/time_pref/diagnosis/language/priority (Reema Idrees HS/Iraqi verified), 5 resources with visibility filter (admin=5, therapist=3 — excludes Client Files/HR Files), 5 directory contacts seeded (Genan as Direct Manager, Ms. Walaa, Ms. Maha, Ms. Fahdah), PUT /api/directory/{id} edit works, Resources CRUD (create/update/delete) works, Intake priority=true creation verified, Intake 403 for therapist, 17 therapists seeded (Ms. Asma + Ms. Jenan added). Frontend Playwright run could NOT complete admin UI verification because the two-step login (click 'Admin / Supervisor' card -> fill email/password) was not reachable via the tried selectors — the text/button overlay intercepted clicks. Admin-side UI from v3 was already verified as functional.

integration_issues.issue: Two-step login (clickable 'Admin / Supervisor' card then email/password form) could not be auto-driven — automation clicked text div but email/password inputs never appeared. Not verified: Schedule 'Sheet'/'Per Therapist'/'By Day' view toggle, Clients multi-service pills, Intake tabs/tiles, Resources grouped sections, Directory Edit modal. Needs main agent self-test or a data-testid on the admin role-chooser button.

action_items: Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md: now 17 therapists (not 13). Add Ms. Najla, Ms. Walaa, Ms. Asma, Ms. Jenan. Client count now 25 (not 20). Intake seed 25 items (12 pre + 13 post).
Add data-testid='admin-login-card' on the 'Admin / Supervisor' button and data-testid='therapist-login-card' on the therapist option of /login so automation can drive the two-step flow.

Main agent should self-verify admin UI for Feb 2026 features: (1) /schedule defaults to 'Sheet' view with view-toggle buttons visible, (2) /clients shows multi-service HS/SS pills for files 009/038, (3) /intake shows Pre/Post tabs + TOTAL/HS/SS/PRIORITY tiles + Service/District/Time/Diagnosis columns, (4) /resources shows 3 grouped sections (THERAPIST RESOURCES / SHARED WITH EVERYONE / ADMIN ONLY) for admin, (5) /directory shows 5 cards with Edit button that opens modal, (6) / (Home) shows weekly sessions KPI.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1198 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; consider splitting into routers/models/seed modules.
CORS still uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — browsers will ignore credentials. For prod, switch to explicit origin list from env.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login or /api/auth/therapist-login (auth playbook recommends 5-fail lockout).
JWT cookie uses SameSite=None without SameSite=Lax fallback — works but tightly bound to HTTPS cross-site.
Intake seed bypasses Pydantic defaults: items without priority/service/etc do not have those keys persisted in MongoDB. Frontend code must handle missing-key gracefully (use ?? / optional chaining).
Re-seed of clients relies on client_seed_version=6 bump — works but any admin-added client is dropped when version bumps. Consider merging instead of delete_many.
@app.on_event('startup') is deprecated in FastAPI — switch to lifespan context manager.

success_rate.frontend: Not verified this iteration due to login selector issue; v3 admin UI verification remains valid

seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds: 1 admin + 17 therapists (PIN=0000) + 25 clients (client_seed_version=6, full multi-service locations) + 25 intake (12 pre + 13 post with service/district/time_pref/diagnosis/language/priority) + 5 directory contacts + 5 resources with visibility. Verified via pytest.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green (17/17). Frontend admin-side NOT re-verified this run because Playwright could not click the 'Admin / Supervisor' role card to reveal email/password. Suggest: (a) add data-testid to login role cards, (b) then run Playwright to verify /schedule view toggle, /clients pills, /intake tiles/tabs, /resources grouping, /directory Edit modal, /home weekly KPI. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers the v4 Feb-2026 changes (25 clients multi-loc, 25 intake new fields, 5 resources visibility, directory edit, resources CRUD, intake priority, therapist 403 on intake).
rca of the issue: N/A — no backend bugs. Frontend UI login blockade in Playwright is a test-automation gap (missing data-testid on role cards), not an application bug.
